title: osmunda × ruggii
intro: Osmunda × ruggii, also known as the Ruggell's Osmund Fern, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Osmunda claytoniana and Osmunda regalis fern species. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Osmunda × ruggii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Osmunda × ruggii can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in traditional herbal medicine as a poultice or compress to aid in the healing of wounds and skin conditions.
